semantic_description: In-place left rotation of an integer array by one position. The function requires n >= 1 and an owned full IntArray a of length n with logical contents l. It saves the first element, shifts elements a[1..n-1] one slot left using a for loop, then writes the saved first element to a[n-1]. The result array has the same length n, its last element equals the original first element, and every earlier index i stores the original element at i+1. The function modifies the input array in place and has no allocation.
